errorSummary.title: There is a problem
errorSummary.text: It looks like you haven’t filled anything yet. Please enter the required information.

income.title: Expected retirement income
income.description: If you reached State Pension age before 6 April 2016, you need to claim the basic State Pension instead. If you're over 80, you might also be able to make a claim for the over 80 pension.

estimatedIncome.title: Estimated Retirement Income
estimatedIncome.description: Use this section to combine your different pension pots and see how much income they may give you in retirement.

serviceCharge.moreInfo: More information about service or factoring charge

electric.labelText: Energy (gas, electricity and other household fuels)

phone.moreInfo: More information about broadband and home phone

internet.moreInfo: More information about paid-for TV and streaming services

petrol.moreInfo: More information about petrol, diesel or electric charging

otherVehicle.labelText: Other vehicle running costs (MOT and services)
otherVehicle.moreInfo: More information about other vehicle costs

loans.moreInfo: More information about loan/credit card repayments

buyNowPayLater.moreInfo: More information about buy now pay later schemes

lifeFuneralInsurance.moreInfo: More information about life and funeral plans

carVanMotorbike.moreInfo: More information about car, van or motorbike insurance

healthBeauty.labelText: Health and beauty (toiletries, hairdressing, eye and dental care)
healthBeauty.moreInfo: More information about personal item costs

medication.moreInfo: More information about prescription and medication costs

petEssentials.moreInfo: More information about pet essentials costs

clothesShoes.moreInfo: More information about clothes and shoes costs

retireAge.labelText: When would you like to retire?

moreInfo.moreInfoLink: Why do we need this information?
moreInfo.infoText: We need your date of birth and sex to work out the earliest you can claim the State Pension – and if this is before or after your planned retirement date.

errors.dob-empty: Enter a valid day, month and year
errors.dob-age-range: You must be at least 18 years old
errors.dob-invalid: Enter a valid date of birth
errors.retire-age-empty: Enter the age you'd like to retire
errors.retire-age-range: Your retirement age must be between 55 and 99
errors.retire-age-less-than-current-age: The earliest retirement age you can enter is the same as your current age

saveAndComeBack.title: Save and come back later
saveAndComeBack.description: Enter your email below and we’ll send you a link to access your saved progress. Use the link to return to your online appointment any time.
saveAndComeBack.emailHint: We’ll only use this to send you a link to access your saved progress.

errorSummary.title: There is a problem
errorSummary.email-generic: Enter an email address in the correct format

errors.email-generic: Error: Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
errors.email-error: There was a problem sending the email, please try again.

progressSaved.title: Progress saved
progressSaved.subtitle: What happens next
progressSaved.description: We’ve sent you an email. It’ll come from xxxx. Make sure to check your spam folder if you haven’t received it.
progressSaved.description2: Click the link in the email to return to your Budget.

errorPage.title: We were unable to save your details
errorPage.description: Something went wrong when saving your data.

goBackToTool.text: return to our Retirement budget planner

contactSupport.rest: if you continue to have issues.
